name: Fettucini with Shrimp and Herb Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 package Lipton creamy herb soup mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the soup mix with milk in a saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture to boiling.
3. Add shrimp and peas.
4. Simmer for 3 minutes until shrimp are tender.
5. Toss with hot noodles and cheese.
6. Makes 2 servings.
